name: Targeter
description: Applies to main carried weapon only. +1 to hit at 0–8", +2 at 8"+. Cannot be fitted to tank guns (vehicle targeting systems already include this). Multiple targeters allowed per figure.

name: Support Targeter
description: Functions as a normal targeter when not deployed. When deployed (takes 1 move phase), allows indirect fire — another figure within 40" can fire at a target the support targeter can see, even without direct line of sight. -2 penalty for the indirect firer.

name: Digimedic
description: If figure receives a hit, roll 1d6. On a 5–6, result is downgraded one step: Kill → GH, GH → NE. Some armour types have them built in.

name: Laser Painter
description: Used to call off-table fire support. Counts as an action (laser painting). Designates any target within 40" with line of sight. Does not expose concealed troops. Used to call reinforcements too.

name: Energy Shield (ES)
description: Protects against lasers, blast weapons, beam guns. -3 modifier for infantry weapons, -1 for tank guns/AT missiles. Goes down on roll of 6 (NE hit) or 3–6 (penetrating hit). Vehicles: 10 pts.

name: Projectile Shield (PS)
description: Protects against bolters, automatics, pistols, ramjet shots, 40–150mm CPP guns, rail guns, Vulcan, missiles, grenades. -3 for infantry weapons, -1 for tank guns. Goes down on 6 (NE) or 3–6 (penetrating). Vehicles: 10 pts.

name: Multi-Shield
description: As either ES or PS (only one can be active at a time). Vehicles only. -2 modifier for infantry weapons, -1 for tank guns. Slightly inferior to dedicated shields against small arms.

name: Null Shield
description: Cannot be harmed by any weapon while active. User may not fire while shield is active. May laser paint.

name: Invisibility/Stealth Cloak
description: Light bending, chameleon shield. Makes wearer invisible in most lighting conditions. Any fire toward cloaked figure: -3 penalty to hit.

name: Jet Pack (FI/Scout)
description: Jump up to 16" (FI) or 19" with scout skill. Accident score 12 (2d6). Cannot be used by civilians or UA troops.

name: Jet Pack (LA)
description: Jump up to 10". Accident score 11 (2d6). Cannot be used by civilians or UA troops.

name: ECM Suite
description: Confuses targeting systems. For vehicle-mounted weapons: -2 to hit. For non-vehicle: negates any targeter bonus.

name: Automatic Defence System (ADS)
description: Detects incoming missiles/grenade/mortar rounds. D10 roll of 6–10 destroys incoming round. Maximum 2 rounds intercepted per turn.

name: Sensor Array
description: Required for vehicle indirect fire support. Detects moving vehicles out of sight (size but not type).

name: Command Array
description: Allows vehicle to act as a command vehicle. When command vehicle is in play: fire support rolls needed 3–6 instead of 4–6.
